sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: B2Gold Faces Earnings Struggles Despite Revenue Surge in Q4
feed.summary: B2Gold (BTG) experienced a significant revenue surge to $1.05 billion in Q4, yet its adjusted EPS of $0.11 fell short of the anticipated $0.18, leading to a stock decline of 4.83%. This discrepancy between strong revenue growth and lower-than-expected earnings points to underlying cost issues or operational challenges. The company's financial health shows a mixed picture with good gross margins but low overall profit margins, prompting investors to closely monitor future strategies to improve profitability.

feed.title: BioAge Labs to Present at Oppenheimer 36th Annual Healthcare Life Sciences Conference
feed.summary: BioAge Labs, Inc. announced its participation in the Oppenheimer 36th Annual Healthcare Life Sciences Conference on February 25-26, 2026. CEO and co-founder Kristen Fortney, PhD, will join a fireside chat, and both Fortney and CFO Dov Goldstein, MD, will hold one-on-one meetings. The company is a clinical-stage biotechnology firm focused on developing therapeutic candidates for metabolic diseases by targeting human aging.

feed.title: Beaten-down software stocks RingCentral and Five9 rally as earnings quell some AI concerns
feed.summary: RingCentral and Five9, leading customer service software providers, experienced significant stock rallies after reporting strong fourth-quarter results, easing investor concerns that AI advancements would negatively impact their business models. Both companies indicated that AI has become a "tailwind," boosting bookings and revenue, with RingCentral's AI-related annual recurring revenue doubling year-over-year and Five9's enterprise AI bookings more than doubling. This positive news comes after a recent massive sell-off in the software sector, driven by fears that new AI tools from firms like Anthropic and OpenAI could displace traditional software-as-a-service models.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics raises quarterly dividend by 6% to $0.53/share
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics has announced a 6% increase in its quarterly cash dividend, raising it from $0.50 per share to $0.53 per share. This new dividend will be payable on or before April 12, 2024, to shareholders of record as of March 29, 2024. The move reflects the company's commitment to returning value to shareholders.

feed.title: Helix Energy takes investor pitch on the road, from Houston to Vegas
feed.summary: Helix Energy Solutions Group (HLX) announced its participation in four upcoming investor conferences spanning February and March 2026, including events in Houston, Orlando, and Las Vegas, as well as a virtual investor access day. The international offshore energy services company will make its investor presentations available on its website. Helix specializes in well intervention, robotics, and decommissioning, crucial services supporting the global energy transition.

feed.title: Helix to Participate in Upcoming Events
feed.summary: Helix Energy Solutions Group, Inc. (NYSE: HLX) announced its participation in several upcoming events in February and March 2026, including the Daniel Energy Partners THRIVE Energy Conference, Raymond James & Associates 47th Annual Institutional Investor Conference, Piper Sandler 26th Annual Energy Conference, and the NYSE Energy & Utilities Virtual Investor Access Day. Investor presentations from these events will be available on Helix's website. The company specializes in offshore energy services, focusing on well intervention, robotics, and decommissioning.

feed.title: First Horizon Corporation to Participate in the Raymond James 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference
feed.summary: First Horizon Corporation announced that CFO Hope Dmuchowski and Chief Credit Officer Thomas Hung will participate in the Raymond James 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference on March 3, 2026. A live webcast and audio replay will be available on the company's Investor Relations website. First Horizon Corporation, with $83.9 billion in assets, is a regional financial services company offering various banking services.

feed.title: Why GATX (GATX) Stock Is Up Today
feed.summary: GATX (NYSE:GATX) stock rose after the company announced strong fourth-quarter 2025 financial results, beating analyst expectations. Additionally, GATX increased its quarterly dividend and authorized a new $300 million share repurchase program, signaling confidence in the company's future. The company also initiated its 2026 earnings guidance and maintained a robust 99.0% North American rail fleet utilization.

feed.title: Haemonetics to Present at Raymond James 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference
feed.summary: Haemonetics Corporation announced that its President and CEO, Chris Simon, will be participating in a fireside chat at the Raymond James 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference on March 2, 2026, at 10:25 a.m. ET. A live webcast will be available on the company's Investor Relations website, with a replay accessible for 90 days following the event. Haemonetics is a global medical technology company focused on improving healthcare quality and efficiency through various innovative solutions.

feed.title: Exact Sciences Stockholders Approve Acquisition by Abbott
feed.summary: Exact Sciences Corporation stockholders have approved the proposed acquisition by Abbott, with over 99% of votes cast in favor of the transaction. The acquisition is expected to close before the end of the second calendar quarter of 2026, granting Exact Sciences stockholders $105.00 in cash per share. Exact Sciences is a leading provider of cancer screening and diagnostic tests, including Cologuard® and Oncotype DX®.

feed.title: Franklin Templeton Canada Announces ETF Cash Distributions
feed.summary: Franklin Templeton Canada has announced cash distributions for several of its ETFs and ETF series of mutual funds. Unitholders of record as of February 27, 2026, will receive monthly per-unit cash distributions on March 9, 2026, for a range of active and passive bond and dividend funds. Additionally, unitholders of record as of March 20, 2026, will receive quarterly distributions on March 30, 2026, for specific quality moat, FTSE index, and multifactor index ETFs.

feed.title: Foresight consolidates ADSs 3-for-1 to support Nasdaq listing
feed.summary: Foresight Autonomous Holdings Ltd. announced a change in its American Depositary Share (ADS) ratio from 1 ADS = 30 ordinary shares to 1 ADS = 90 ordinary shares, effective February 26, 2026. This 3-for-1 consolidation aims to help the company maintain compliance with Nasdaq listing requirements. While ADS holders will exchange three existing ADSs for one new one, ownership percentages and voting power of shareholders will not be affected.

feed.title: Exact Sciences Stockholders Approve Acquisition by Abbott
feed.summary: Exact Sciences Corporation stockholders have approved the proposed acquisition by Abbott, with over 99% of votes cast in favor of the transaction. The acquisition is expected to close before the end of the second calendar quarter of 2026, with Exact Sciences stockholders receiving $105.00 in cash per share. Exact Sciences is a leading provider of cancer screening and diagnostic tests.

feed.title: Travelers stock hits all-time high at 304.4 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Travelers Companies Inc. (TRV) stock reached an all-time high of $304.4, reflecting a 26.68% increase over the past year and underscoring strong performance and investor confidence. The company, with a $65.8 billion market cap, trades at a P/E ratio of 11.04, suggesting attractive value. Recent analyst ratings show a mix of price target adjustments following strong quarterly results, with Raymond James raising its target to $330, while Jefferies, UBS, and Mizuho adjusted theirs downwards or maintained ratings.

feed.title: James A. Goldman to Retire from Domino’s Pizza Board
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza announced that James A. Goldman will retire from its Board of Directors and will not seek re-election at the 2026 Annual Meeting, though he will serve through the end of his current term. Goldman is retiring after more than 15 years of service to the company. His replacement information has not yet been disclosed.

feed.title: Amicus Therapeutics Announces Full-Year 2025 Financial Results and Corporate Updates
feed.summary: Amicus Therapeutics has announced its full-year 2025 financial results, reporting significant revenue growth and improved financial performance. The company's total revenues reached $634.2 million, a 17% increase year-over-year, driven by strong sales of Galafold and Pombiliti + Opfolda. Amicus also revealed its definitive agreement to be acquired by BioMarin Therapeutics for approximately $4.8 billion, a transaction expected to close in Q2 2026.

feed.title: Fennec Pharmaceuticals presents real-world data showing PEDMARK feasible, well tolerated in adults with head & neck cancer
feed.summary: Fennec Pharmaceuticals announced positive real-world data for PEDMARK, demonstrating its feasibility and tolerability in adult head and neck cancer patients when administered at least six hours after cisplatin. Presented at MHNCS, the multi-institutional review showed PEDMARK integration was easy, did not disrupt cisplatin treatment, and was well tolerated with minimal side effects. The data also suggested potential hearing preservation benefits for high-risk patients.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage (EXR) Reports Positive Q4 FFO Growth
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage (EXR) reported a 2.5% increase in core funds from operations (FFO) for Q4 2025 and a 1.1% full-year growth, despite challenging market conditions, driven by strategic share repurchases and acquisitions. The company projects 2026 same-store revenue growth to be between -0.5% and 1.5% and core FFO per share between $8.05 and $8.35. While EXR shows strong profitability and market position, its Altman Z-Score indicates potential financial instability and a high dividend payout ratio raises sustainability concerns.

feed.title: Analog Devices stock reaches all-time high of 355.45 USD
feed.summary: Analog Devices Inc. (ADI) stock hit an all-time high of $355.23, marking a 44% increase over the past year. Despite a P/E ratio of 64.25 and being considered overvalued by InvestingPro, investor confidence is high due to robust financial health and 26% revenue growth. Recent analyst reports reiterate positive outlooks, citing strong performance in various segments and improved margins.

feed.title: Expert Outlook: Consolidated Edison Through The Eyes Of 9 Analysts
feed.summary: Nine analysts have recently provided their evaluations of Consolidated Edison (NYSE: ED), showing a mix of somewhat bearish and indifferent sentiments. The average 12-month price target for ED is $102.33, reflecting a slight decrease from the previous average. Consolidated Edison, a holding company for utilities in southeastern New York and parts of New Jersey, demonstrates strong financial performance with a high market capitalization, impressive net margin, and effective asset utilization.

feed.title: Packaging Corp CEO to field questions at Bank of America event
feed.summary: Packaging Corporation of America's CEO, Mark Kowlzan, will speak at Bank of America Securities' Global Agriculture and Materials Conference on Thursday, February 26, 2026. He and CFO Kent Pflederer will participate in a Q&A session and host one-on-one meetings. A webcast of the fireside chat will be available on the company's website.

feed.title: Prothena Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results, and Provides Financial Guidance and Business Highlights
feed.summary: Prothena Corporation plc reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, detailing a net loss of $21.6 million and $244.1 million, respectively, and providing a financial guidance for 2026. The company highlighted advancements in its pipeline, including the initiation of Phase 3 clinical trials for prasinezumab and coramitug by its partners Roche and Novo Nordisk, respectively, and the progression of other partnered and proprietary programs. Prothena also discussed its cash position, expected net cash use for 2026, and the potential for a share redemption program.

feed.title: TrueFoundry Recognized as a Representative Vendor in Gartner Market Guide for AI Gateways
feed.summary: TrueFoundry, an enterprise AI infrastructure platform, has been recognized as a Representative Vendor in the 2025 Gartner Market Guide for AI Gateways. Their AI Gateway, launched in December 2025, helps enterprises manage AI models, prompts, and guardrails from a central hub, addressing challenges in governance, control, reliability, and cost optimization of AI workloads. Gartner predicts that by 2028, 70% of software engineering teams building multimodal applications will use AI gateways to improve reliability and optimize costs.

feed.title: Escalade Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results Conference Call Date
feed.summary: Escalade, Inc. announced that it will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results before the market opens on Friday, February 27, 2026. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 11:00 a.m. ET to discuss the results and host a Q&A session. A webcast will also be available on the company's investor relations website, and dial-in details are provided for live participation and replay access.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics Announces First Quarter 2026 Cash Dividend Increase of 6%
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics, Inc. announced a 6% increase in its first-quarter cash dividend to $0.53 per common share, payable on April 10, 2026, to shareholders of record by March 31, 2026. This decision reflects the company's strong cash generation capabilities and commitment to strategic growth while maintaining an investment-grade credit rating. Steel Dynamics is a leading industrial metals solutions company operating a circular manufacturing model and expanding into aluminum operations.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics Announces First Quarter 2026 Cash Dividend Increase of 6%
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics, Inc. announced a 6% increase in its first-quarter 2026 cash dividend to $0.53 per common share, payable on April 10, 2026, to shareholders of record by March 31, 2026. This increase reflects the company's strong cash generation, commitment to growth initiatives, and confidence in its financial stability and future prospects. The company emphasizes its strong capital structure, liquidity profile, and commitment to maintaining an investment-grade credit rating.

feed.title: Travelers stock hits all-time high at 304.4 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Travelers Companies Inc. stock reached an all-time high of $304.4 USD, reflecting a 26.68% increase over the past year and underscoring strong performance and investor confidence. The insurance giant, with a $65.8 billion market cap, trades at a P/E ratio of 11.04, which InvestingPro data suggests represents attractive value. This milestone is supported by solid financial results and strategic initiatives, though analysts have varied price targets ranging from $290 to $330.

feed.title: Is Weyerhaeuser’s 5% Yield a Value Trap or Quiet REIT Bargain?
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser (WY), a timber REIT, has lagged the S&P 500, pushing its dividend yield higher. The article analyzes whether WY is a low-attention income play benefiting from housing and interest rate changes, or a value trap tied to a slow construction market. It explores how WY makes money through timberlands, real estate, and wood products, highlighting its dependence on US housing and interest rates, and provides a balanced view of risks and opportunities for investors.

feed.title: Dept Powers Up Its Global Content Studio With Adobe AI
feed.summary: DEPT has transformed its 500-person global content studio into DEPT Studios, an AI-enabled content operating system developed in collaboration with Adobe. This overhaul integrates Adobe's enterprise software, including GenStudio, Workfront, Frame.io, and Firefly AI tools, to automate content production and review processes. The initiative aims to meet the increasing demand for marketing content by leveraging AI and proprietary systems for large-scale global content creation.

This achievement is supported by strong financial results and strategic initiatives, with analysts offering varied perspectives on future performance. The stock's current P/E ratio suggests attractive value relative to its near-term earnings growth potential.

feed.title: CHF42.54 close: Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY.SW, SIX) 20 Feb 2026 oversold bounce
feed.summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY.SW) closed at CHF 42.54 on February 20, 2026, marking a 4.40% drop and presenting a potential oversold bounce opportunity for short-term traders. The stock exhibits reasonable fundamentals with a PE of 15.99 and a dividend yield of 3.50%, but carries caution due to leverage metrics. Meyka AI rates BMY.SW at 73.32/100, forecasting CHF 39.34 for one year, suggesting limited structural upside but not precluding short-term mean reversion.

feed.title: Bank of the James Financial Group (NASDAQ:BOTJ) President Robert Chapman Purchases 1,200 Shares
feed.summary: Bank of the James Financial Group President Robert Chapman recently acquired 1,200 shares of the company's stock at an average price of $20.89 per share, totaling $25,068.00. This transaction increases his direct ownership to 124,118 shares, valued at over $2.5 million. The company reported quarterly earnings of $0.60 per share and revenue of $12.86 million, and also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.10 per share.

feed.title: Insider Buying: Friedman Industries (NASDAQ:FRD) CEO Buys 600 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Friedman Industries (NASDAQ:FRD) CEO Mike Taylor purchased 600 shares of the company's stock on February 18th at an average price of $18.75 per share, totaling $11,250. This transaction increased his direct ownership to 222,166 shares. The company recently reported $0.43 EPS on $167.97 million in quarterly revenue, has a market cap of $128.7 million, and pays a quarterly dividend of $0.04.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Clean Harbors (NYSE:CLH) CFO Sells 2,788 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Clean Harbors' CFO Eric Dugas sold 2,788 shares of company stock for approximately $784,292, reducing his stake by nearly 15%. This transaction comes after the company reported strong Q4 results, beating analyst estimates for EPS and revenue, which led to a stock increase and generally raised price targets from analysts. Clean Harbors is also expanding strategically through an acquisition and investments in its services.

feed.title: William Bryant III Acquires 600 Shares of Bank of the James Financial Group (NASDAQ:BOTJ) Stock
feed.summary: William Bryant III, a Director at Bank of the James Financial Group (NASDAQ:BOTJ), recently acquired 600 shares of the company's stock for $20.82 per share, totaling $12,492.00, increasing his ownership to 76,673 shares. This transaction follows the company's Q4 earnings report of $0.60 EPS and $12.86 million in revenue, alongside an announced quarterly dividend of $0.10. The stock currently has a "Hold" rating from analysts.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Ken Bowles Sells 10,000 Shares of Smurfit WestRock PLC
feed.summary: Ken Bowles, Executive Vice President and Group Chief Financial Officer of Smurfit WestRock PLC, sold 10,000 shares of the company on February 19, 2026. This transaction leaves him with 151,644 shares. The stock is currently trading at $51.26, exhibiting a price-earnings ratio of 34.03, and is considered fairly valued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.06.

feed.title: ESPEY MFG & ELECTRONICS (NYSE:ESP) Director Sells $138,960.00 in Stock
feed.summary: ESPEY MFG & ELECTRONICS (NYSE:ESP) Director Paul Corr sold 2,400 shares of the company's stock for $138,960.00, reducing his position by 10.51%. The transaction took place on February 18th, and the sale was disclosed in an SEC filing. The stock traded down 2.9% following the news, and several hedge funds have recently established new positions in the company, which holds a "Strong Buy" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: Starfighters Space’s Tim Franta on Rockets, Supersonic Flights, And Market Edge
feed.summary: Tim Franta of Starfighters Space discusses the company's unique position in the spaceflight industry. He explains their competitive advantages and how they are contributing to the advancement of future space travel. The article highlights how Starfighters Space is shaping the next generation of rockets and supersonic flights.

feed.title: JP Morgan Lowers Price Target for Endava (DAVA) to $9, Maintains Neutral Rating | DAVA Stock News
feed.summary: JP Morgan has lowered its price target for Endava (DAVA) from $10 to $9, while maintaining a Neutral rating. This adjustment reflects a cautious stance amidst a series of recent price target reductions from other firms like Needham and Guggenheim, though Wall Street analysts still forecast a significant upside for DAVA. The company, an IT services provider focused on digital transformation, currently trades at $5.01, with an average target price of $10.30 predicting a 105.50% upside.

feed.title: Superior Plus (TSE:SPB) Lowered to "Neutral" Rating by Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce
feed.summary: Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce has downgraded Superior Plus (TSE:SPB) from an "outperform" to a "neutral" rating, setting a new price objective of C$8.00. This new target suggests a potential upside of 25.20% from the stock's previous close. Other analysts have recently adjusted their price targets and ratings for Superior Plus, with the company currently holding an average rating of "Moderate Buy" across several firms.

feed.title: U.S. Supreme Court Invalidates Some Trump Tariffs, But Most Auto Industry Tariffs Remain In Effect
feed.summary: The U.S. Supreme Court has invalidated some tariffs enacted by the Trump administration under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act of 1977, deeming them unconstitutional. However, most auto industry-related tariffs, including those on auto parts, steel, aluminum, and vehicles, remain in effect as they were issued under other laws like the Trade Expansion Act of 1962. This ruling means that car buyers should not expect immediate drops in new-car prices, as automakers continue to bear significant tariff costs.

feed.title: Global economic review 2022
feed.summary: This article provides a global economic review for the year 2022. It presents an overview of key economic trends and developments that shaped the global financial landscape throughout that period.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Raises MTY Food Group (TSE:MTY) Price Target to C$46.00
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has increased its price target for MTY Food Group (TSE:MTY) to C$46.00 from C$44.00, maintaining a "market perform" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 6.95% from the previous closing price. Other analysts from Scotiabank, TD Securities, and Royal Bank Of Canada have also recently raised their price targets for MTY Food Group.

feed.title: HHLR Advisors Fully Exits Baidu as AI Push Tests Its Advertising-Funded Model
feed.summary: HHLR Advisors has completely divested its position in Baidu, selling approximately 1.64 million shares valued at $216.23 million in Q4 2025. This move comes as Baidu is transitioning its business model from advertising-funded search to AI infrastructure and enterprise cloud solutions, alongside investments in autonomous driving. The significant exit by HHLR Advisors, which previously held 5.3% of its AUM in Baidu, highlights investor scrutiny over Baidu's ability to diversify revenue and ensure sustainable growth beyond its core advertising business.

feed.title: Century Aluminum Company Statement on U.S. Supreme Court IEEPA Ruling
feed.summary: Century Aluminum Company issued a statement affirming its support for President Trump's America First trade policies, specifically the Section 232 steel and aluminum tariffs, even after a U.S. Supreme Court decision on IEEPA tariffs. The company highlighted its investments in expanding U.S. primary aluminum production, including a 10% increase at its Mt. Holly smelter and plans for a new smelter in Oklahoma, crediting these actions to the effectiveness of the Section 232 program. Century Aluminum is the largest producer of primary aluminum in the U.S. and plans further significant investments.

feed.title: Denison receives final regulatory approvals to construct uranium mine
feed.summary: Denison Mines Corp. has received final regulatory approvals from the Canadian Nuclear Safety Commission for its Wheeler River Uranium Project in northern Saskatchewan. This includes the approval of the environmental assessment and the issuance of a Licence to Prepare Site and Construct a Mine and Mill, making it the first large-scale Canadian uranium mine approved for construction in over 20 years using the in-situ recovery method. The company aims for first production by mid-2028 and is poised to make a final investment decision to begin construction immediately.

feed.title: Church & Dwight (NYSE:CHD) Price Target Raised to $112.00 at TD Cowen
feed.summary: TD Cowen has raised its price target for Church & Dwight (NYSE:CHD) to $112.00 from $99.00, maintaining a "hold" rating and indicating a potential upside of 8.60%. This follows Church & Dwight's Q4 earnings beat, with EPS at $0.86 against an estimated $0.84, and a 3.9% year-over-year revenue increase. The company also provided FY2026 EPS guidance of $3.71–$3.81.

feed.title: UBS Group Lowers KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) Price Target to $125.00
feed.summary: UBS Group has reduced its price target for KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) to $125.00 from $168.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 24.09% from the stock's previous close. Despite missing EPS estimates slightly in the latest quarter, KKR saw a significant 76.1% year-over-year revenue increase, and insiders have been actively purchasing shares.

feed.title: Amer Sports (NYSE:AS) Hits New 12-Month High - What's Next?
feed.summary: Amer Sports (NYSE:AS) recently hit a new 52-week high, trading up to $42.76 and closing around $42.10, showing strong market performance with a market cap near $23.2 billion. The company has received broadly positive analyst sentiment, with a consensus "Buy" rating and an average price target of $46.89. This follows Amer Sports beating recent earnings estimates, reporting $0.33 EPS against an expected $0.25 and 29.7% year-over-year revenue growth.
